v0.6.1.description:
Bug fixes
- Resetting does not misfire the `Beat Rival` check
- Trainersanity rules for GLC trainers check if a player has the key required, previously was checking how many of the required key they had
- E4 access tied to `BadgeRequirement`, previously was defaulting to 8 because of a typo
- Added missing EXP values to `growth_rates` dict
- Rental randomness fixes
  - Shuffler fixed
  - Patching fixed, offset used during writing was not being updated correctly
